description_long: This is a high-top sneaker with a classic Converse Chuck Taylor All Star design, featuring a black canvas upper and white rubber toe cap. The shoe has white laces threaded through metal eyelets and a white rubber midsole with a textured pattern. On the side, there is a circular Converse All Star logo patch with a blue star and red text. The interior lining appears to be a light brown or tan color, and the shoe shows some signs of wear, particularly on the midsole and toe cap, which have visible scuff marks. The overall silhouette is slim and iconic, with a flat sole and ankle-high collar. This type of shoe is commonly seen in urban environments and is known for its casual, versatile style.
description: A black high-top Converse sneaker with white laces, rubber toe cap, and visible All Star logo patch, showing some signs of wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the Converse All Star logo patch, white laces, and scuffed white rubber sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the white laces, rounded rubber toe cap, and the shoe's symmetrical shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the logo patch visible, showing the shoe's profile and worn midsole.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the heel, black canvas, and the back seam of the shoe.
attribute_logo: Circular Converse All Star patch on the side, white background with blue star and red text
